notableEvents.label: Ian Happ GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ian Happ grounds into a double play, pitcher Logan Webb to shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Bryce Eldridge. Michael Busch out at 2nd. Ian Happ out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ian Happ rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ian Happ grounds into a double play, pitcher Logan Webb to shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Bryce Eldridge. Michael Busch out at 2nd. Ian Happ out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Alex Bregman singles on a pop up to first baseman Casey Schmitt. Dansby Swanson scores. Alex Bregman to 2nd. Throwing error by first baseman Casey Schmitt.

notableEvents.label: Casey Schmitt plunked
notableEvents.detail: Casey Schmitt hit by pitch. Bryce Eldridge to 3rd. Rafael Devers to 2nd.
